description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage that defines separate jobs for each target environment: .Alpine Linux (uses alpine:latest, runs apk add --update alpine-sdk autoconf automake libtool clang-dev cmake ninja qt5-qtbase-dev qt5-qttools-dev boost-dev ttf-freefont xvfb in before_script then ./ci/build-gitlab.sh), .OS X (inherits the global ubuntu:xenial image, runs ./ci/build-gitlab.sh with CC=clang and CXX=clang++ and tags clang and osx), .Ubuntu Linux Trusty (uses ubuntu:trusty, runs ./util/build_prep/update-common && ./util/build_prep/ubuntu/prep.sh then ./ci/build-gitlab.sh, sets CC=gcc CXX=g++ FLAVOR=trusty and uploads artifacts expiring in 2d with paths build*/*.tar*, build*/*_test, csa_results, build*/SHA1SUMS), .Ubuntu Linux:ASAN and .Ubuntu Linux:TSAN (both use ubuntu:trusty, same before_script and script, set ASAN=1 FLAVOR=zesty_asan or TSAN=1 FLAVOR=zesty_tsan respectively, and share the same artifacts), .linux_template (hidden template with BOOST_ROOT=/usr/local/boost CC=clang CXX=clang++ and the common script and artifacts), Arch Linux (uses base/devel:latest, installs qt5-tools xorg-server-xvfb clang clang-tools-extra cmake boost boost-libs ninja lsb-release, runs mkdir -p csa_results/ and scan-build -o csa_results/ ./ci/build-gitlab.sh, inherits BOOST_ROOT, CC, CXX from the template and uploads the same artifacts), Artful OPTIMIZED (uses ubuntu:artful, runs the common before_script and script, sets FLAVOR=artful SIMD=1), Ubuntu Linux Artful (ubuntu:artful, same script, FLAVOR=artful), Ubuntu Linux Xenial (ubuntu:xenial, same script, FLAVOR=xenial), Ubuntu Linux Xenial Beta (ubuntu:xenial, same script, BETA=1 FLAVOR=xenial), and Xenial OPTIMIZED (ubuntu:xenial, same script, FLAVOR=xenial SIMD=1). All build jobs (except Alpine and OS X) produce the defined artifacts, and the pipeline uses the global variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive.
